channel.title: 3c-sic; xps; leed; hreels; band diagram; wet chemical etching; work function; interface on LMI

item.title: The (001) 3C Sic Surface Termination And Band Structure After Common Wet Chemical Etching Procedures, Stated By Xps, Leed, And Hreels
